text: Hi Jennifer and Angela, quick ask. I am coordinating fall logistics for a few Pembroke parents whose kids cross over with the museum's after-school programming, and Naomi's name came up because of the orchestra schedule. Could one of you forward Naomi's orchestra calendar (just the recurring slots) so I can match it against the museum kids' overlap? Thanks!
